build.notes: Build completes successfully with expected asset size warnings only.

lint.notes: CRLF line endings were auto-fixed. Remaining issues: 2 unused variables in PostHero.tsx, and unrelated warnings in other blocks (experimental API usage).

registration.notes: All required files exist. block.json is properly configured with apiVersion 3, correct attributes, and proper block metadata.

attributes.notes: All attributes defined correctly in block.json with proper types and defaults. showExcerpt defaults to false, useTopicColor defaults to false, anchor is optional.

edgeCases.notes: Block handles empty states correctly: topic pill hidden when no categories, excerpt hidden when showExcerpt is false or no excerpt exists, background image hidden when no featured image. Test page content from REST API shows all variations rendering without errors.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements - block displays static post content with no user interactions.

patternCompliance.notes: Uses semantic <section> element for hero landmark. Uses <h1> for page heading. Background image has role='presentation' and alt='' per PHP line 55-56, correctly marking it as decorative. All text content uses semantic paragraph elements.

semanticHTML.notes: Proper heading hierarchy with h1 for post title. Uses semantic section element. Text content in p tags. Background image properly marked as decorative with role='presentation' and empty alt.

keyboardNavigation.notes: No interactive elements requiring keyboard navigation. All content is static text and images.

ariaAttributes.notes: No ARIA attributes required. Background image correctly uses role='presentation' to mark as decorative.

colorContrast.notes: All text uses text-charcoal (#1f1f1d) on light gradient backgrounds. Topic pill uses bg-accent-lighter with border-accent and text-charcoal, following the existing pattern from FeaturedPost and card-post.php.

markupDuplication.notes: No responsive duplication detected. Block uses responsive utilities (pb-8 sm:pb-16, pt-[calc(...)]) without duplicating markup.

tsxPhpSync.notes: Critical sync issue: PHP manually extracts attributes instead of using auto-extracted variables. Also missing @var docblock. Otherwise structure matches well.

innerBlocks.reason: Block does not support inner blocks.

specCompliance.notes: Test page created as post (not page) with 4 variations matching the spec. Post has featured image (ID 19), category 'Student Life' with blue accent color, excerpt, author, and date. All variations render correctly per REST API content field.

issues.description: PHP template manually extracts attributes from $attributes array instead of using auto-extracted variables
issues.fix: Remove lines 10-11: `$showExcerpt = $attributes['showExcerpt'] ?? false;` and `$useTopicColor = $attributes['useTopicColor'] ?? false;`. The theme's inc/helpers/blocks.php automatically calls extract($attributes, EXTR_SKIP) before including PHP templates, so all attributes are already available as local variables. Use `$showExcerpt ?? false` and `$useTopicColor ?? false` directly in conditionals instead.
issues.alsoUpdate: Add @var docblock at top of PostHero.php with: @var bool $showExcerpt and @var bool $useTopicColor

issues.description: PHP template missing @var docblock for camelCase attribute variables, which causes PHP_CodeSniffer warnings
issues.fix:
Add docblock after opening comment (before line 10) with:
/**
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var string|null $anchor
 * @var bool $showExcerpt
 * @var bool $useTopicColor
 *
 * Also available:
 * @var string $content Block content
 * @var WP_Block $block Block instance
 */

This tells PHP_CodeSniffer that camelCase variables come from block attributes and should be ignored.
Remove unused destructured variable 'postId' from line 42 (keep only 'post'). Remove unused variable 'featuredMediaId' from line 51-52 (only featuredMediaUrl is used).

issues.description: Inconsistent conditional check for topic pill accent color between TSX and PHP
issues.fix: TSX line 181-182 uses `[ categoryAccentColor ]: !! categoryAccentColor` which adds the class when categoryAccentColor is truthy. PHP line 74 uses `$categoryAccentColor => ! empty( $categoryAccentColor )` which does the same. Both are correct but use different syntax. For consistency, TSX should use `[ categoryAccentColor ]: ! empty( categoryAccentColor )` pattern (though functionally equivalent). Actually, the check is consistent - !! in JS is equivalent to ! empty() in PHP. This is ACCEPTABLE, not an issue. Retracting this issue.

passedChecks: Block registers correctly with proper metadata
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
Test page exists with 4 block variations (as post, not page)
Empty states handled correctly (no category = no pill, no excerpt = no excerpt display, no featured image = no background image)
Block renders post content correctly from REST API response
TSX and PHP structure match (section > top-gradient + hero-inner > background layer + content layer)
Semantic HTML: uses section element, h1 heading, proper paragraph tags
Accessibility: background image marked as decorative with role='presentation' and alt=''
Block uses correct typography tokens (text-header-0, text-lg, text-sm, text-body-large)
Proper spacing tokens (gap-6, mt-6, mt-12, pb-8 sm:pb-16)
Topic pill always uses topic accent color via scoped accent_color class
Section element conditionally uses topic accent color when useTopicColor is true
Conditional rendering matches between TSX and PHP (pill, excerpt, background image)
